summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: 2×2 det as signed parallelogram area. 4 ValueTrackers a, b, c, d drive columns. always_redraw BLUE column-1 + ORANGE column-2 arrows + parallelogram (GREEN if det>0, RED if det<0). 5-config tour including singular (det=0) and negative-det flip. Matrix display + live det and area.
